letters.author: Yayyuuu
letters.content:
Happy 21st Birthday, Mannat!

I still remember January 20th, 2024, like it was yesterday. Meeting you changed everything for me, and looking back at the last two years, I am just so incredibly grateful that you walked into my life.

You have the biggest heart of anyone I know. Watching you work so hard while your profs, balancing the crazy hours, the endless studying, and still somehow finding the time to be the most loving and supportive partner is honestly inspiring. You are going to make such an amazing doctor, but more importantly, you are just a beautiful person inside and out.

Twenty one is a huge milestone, and I hope this year brings you all the happiness, success, and peace you deserve. I promise to be right by your side through all of it, cheering you on through every exam and celebrating every single win with you.

Thank you for your smiles, your warmth, and for loving me the way you do. I love you more than words can say.

Have the happiest birthday, my love.

Yours,
Yayyuuuu

letters.author: Mehalululululu
letters.content: Welcome to the 21th episode of life! Adulting might seem new and full of adventures, but remember that you are the strongest and most resilient person. But i am so sure you will smash the ass out of all the storm and thunder that comes your way.  I've dealt with half of it myself, and trust me having a friend like you made it so much bearable ! Having you in my life is the greatest blessing I could ever have. You feel like home, making everything seem easier. With you, I can be myself, and that's the biggest comfort you have always provided me. You held on to me at a point where i lost every hope in friendship and sustaining in Hardinge. You were that friend who was always there to wipe those tears off and rant the shit off with me to make me feel better. From my Blues to Yellows, you were the only one that stayed ! Thank you would be a tiny word to express my gratitude!  Never let anyone wither that pure soul you have! You deserve all the happiness in this world and i hope you conquer every dream you have for yourself. I am so proud of you for the way you have dealt with LITERALLY EVERY THUNDER that came your way be it dealing with JYOTI MANISH APOORVA SUNITA DAS, you literally showed everyone WHAT AN ABSOLUTE STAR YOU ARE!!!! Rooting for you to continue being the “IT” girl that you are!  I promise you as I always say that on the 30th of February, I will stop loving you and sticking with you through your thick and thin.

letters.author: Divyani
letters.content:
Happiest birthday to the most charming soul I’ve ever met!

I’m so grateful to have met you, and even more grateful that we’ve grown so close over time. You radiate such positive energy that being around you makes it feel like everything is gonna work out.

You deserve everything you desire and so much more!
Wishing you the absolute best, always. Thank you for being the wonderful person you are!🧿

May this year bring you all the happiness and love, and all the wholesomeness you deserve!!!

Have the most amazing birthday!🎉🎀💌

letters.author: Asmita
letters.content:
Dear Mannat,
It's funny to think that before joining Q-rious, I didn't even know you that well. We started out as friends but somewhere along the way, you became one of my closest friends.

One of the things I admire the most about you is how effortlessly you make everyone feel comfortable and included. How you greet everyone with the warmest smile and the biggest wave. And I don't need to think twice before saying that you're no doubt the best thing Q-rious gave me. Throughout the year, when things got stressful and overwhelming, you were the one you kept me sane and reminded me to stay calm. 

You're the sweetest, most beautiful person (inside out) and a certified cutieeee with the prettiest smile. 
Thank you for being such a wonderful friend. I hope life gives you back all the love and happiness, that you so freely give to others.

Happy Birthday Mannat❤️ 
I'm so grateful to have you.

With lots of love, 
Asmita

letters.author: Trishita
letters.content:
Happiestt birthdayyy Mannat di! 
You’re the sweetest person ever, and I’m so so lucky to have you. I just loveee randomly talking to you about all the things happening in my life. And how you come up with the coolest solution for each one of themm. Be it surgery ka endpost or medicine ka kaand lol. Apart from these, thank you for always being there for me, whenever I needed you. It has really meant alottt. You’ve made my life here much much easier. 🥹❤️
Also I hope you know, I’ll always be there for you as well. 
Once again, a very happy birthday di. 
Lots of love,
Trishita.

letters.author: Insha
letters.content:
Dear Mannat diiii,

happiest happiest birthday to you!💗🎀 

it's funny because every time i think of you, the first thing that comes to mind is your smile. i don't think i've ever seen you without one. ever since i met you, you've always been this incredibly warm, bubbly person who somehow makes everyone around you feel a little more at ease. you're one of those people jinke paas rehke kabhi awkward ya out of place feel hi nahi hota. even on days when things feel overwhelming, just seeing you around makes it feel like, "it's okay...ho jayega."

rab kare, iss saal tuhanu oh saari khushiyan milan jinna di tussi sachmuch haqqdaar ho. may every little dream you're quietly holding onto come true.
(ps. punjabi to nhi aati to thoda sa translate use kiya hai👉🏻👈🏻 )

happy birthday once again, didi. i hope this year brings you endless happiness, good health, and memories you'll always hold close.

lots of love 🤍
~Insha

letters.author: Palak di
letters.content:
To my dearestttt Mannat,

The most charismatic person ever. Never believed that one person has the power to light up every room they walk into and fill it with sunshine, until I met you. When I first saw you all I could sense was this patakha kudi with killer bhangra moves and the most helpful junior anyone could rely on🥹❤️. You’ve been the strongest, most hardworking, most optimistic person I have seen and I feel so so lucky to be connected to a person like you. I am so glad I could steal you from Viola into Q-rious and make you a part of Q-fam. The way you handle everything, with so much strength and optimism is amazing and ofc YOUR OG PR SKILLS. Thankyou for always being there be it a 4am quiz prep or be it making me learn Ca Larynx in 5 mins or be it sharing intense gossips or be it you being close enough to roast me about Dehradun🤧. I wish youuu all the BEST for yourrr futureee and may you achieve everything that you aspire and continue becoming the STRONGEST GORGEOUS WOMAN that you are! Always sooo proud of you!! Keep that BIG smile always on & keep that strength to fight hijackers (uk who) always intact! LOVE YOU SO MUCHHHHH!!! Happy happy birthday baby❤️❤️❤️❤️

P.s. yes will always feed you extra cake because you deserve it

letters.author: Priyanshi di
letters.content:
Happy 21st babygirl 🥹💗
I still vividly remember seeing you for the first time as just this incredibly cute, pretty girl walking around campus(I'm pretty sure you didn't even know i existed lol). Finding out you were in Viola and the quizzing society just added to your whole aura uk... Qrious made me know things about you a little bit better but honestly I didn't know back then how big of a part of my life you’d become.
You have literally always been there for me, no matter what. I can never forget when i was using your laptop jjst a day before Splash for some super important work.. From there, we slowly started talking and those random conversations all throughout the campus became my favorite part of the day.
Our entire safar(lol) from "vartmaan aankhon ka dhoka hai” to you listening to my absolute wildest rants, letting me vent and honestly, bitching about literally everyone (even your favorite senior😭)hhas been so special. I love how you have never judged me, not even once. You’re one of those rare people where we don’t need to talk or meet every single day, but the second we do, it feels like no time has passed at all.
It actually breaks my heart a little that we haven’t been able to spend as much time together as I wanted, especially now that it's my final year. But that little detour to Carvel? Easily one of my absolute best memories. Sometimes, just having lunch and sharing that insane ice cream cake with you was a way of bonding uk.. Even though time is short right now, I am manifesting WAY TOO MANY THINGS for us to look forward to(pls god pls) karaoke dates, arcade days, proper lunches and endless gossip sessions. I hope you realise you’ve been my quiet, patient safe space through so much text and real life drama, always supporting me... With you, I can just be 100% myself(and I really wish and hope I cam be the same for you)...I wish you get everything you deserve, which is nothing but the absolute best. Stay super healthy, super happy and always this super chill. (And please spend more time with me lol!). I hope you realize how incredibly proud I am of you. You have come such a long way Mannat. I know your family, your grandparents, uncle, aunty, didi and everyone who loves you can see how much you’ve grown. It’s a beautiful difference and it’s all because of the genuine effort you put into yourself and into the people around you..Keep growing, keep learning and take all the happiness this life has to offer.
I love you so so so much. Have the best day ever and I miss you like crazy(i really hope jaise hi aau mai wapas and I'm in campus, ekdam sey kahi sey DIDIIIIII aawaz aayegi and yes, I'll give you a bear hug) 😭💗
Always here for you..❤️

letters.author: Mansha di
letters.content:
Happy Birthday, Mannat! ❤️

I honestly don't remember exactly where we first met—I think it was during the SU elections while asking for votes. But I clearly remember my first impression of you: "Omg, she's literally just like me!" And then I found out we were from the same coaching too, which made it even better. 🥹

One of my favourite memories has to be when you lent me your lehenga for Navratri. It was such a sweet gesture, and that's just the kind of person you are—always so thoughtful and caring.

I'll also never forget the first day of my paediatrics internship when my legs were absolutely dead after walking around 20,000 steps, and you got me ibuprofen. It was such a small thing, but it meant a lot because it showed how naturally you look out for the people around you.

I genuinely hope everything works out in your favour because you truly deserve it. Keep working hard, keep enjoying every single day, and never lose the amazing person you are.

Happy Birthday once again, pookie. Love you loads! ♥️

letters.author: Team Q-rious
letters.content:
Happy Birthdayyy, Mannat di! 🥳💖

Janamdin dian dher saariyan mubarkan! 🌷🤗❤️ Tussi twade birthday nu lakh lakh vadaiyan! Rabb tuhanu hamesha khush raakhe, tandurusti te kamyabi naal nawaze. Tuhadi har ik khwahish poori hove te zindagi vich hamesha khushiyan hi khushiyan aun. 💖✨ Tussi hamesha edan hi hassde muskuraunde raho, te tuhade saare supne sach hon. Ajj da din tuhade layi bohat khaas te yaadgaar hove! 🥳🎉

Thank you for always having our backs, di. Whenever something went wrong, we knew we could call you, and you’d always be there with a solution. Every time you said, “Stress mat lo, sab ho jayega,” we believed you, and somehow, things always did work out. ❤️

Beyond being incredibly talented and creative 🤓, you’re also one of the sweetest and most approachable seniors. You have such a wonderful way of encouraging people, making everyone feel supported, and bringing out the best in those around you. 🎀

Here’s to the coolest PR & Design Head! 🥂 We hope this year brings you endless happiness, good health, success, and all the positivity you’ve shared with so many of us. May all your dreams come true, and may this year be filled with countless reasons to smile.

We love you a lottt, di! Have the happiest birthday! ❤️🎂✨

~ Q-rious

letters.author: Deepita di
letters.content:
Mannat!!!! Here’s to the sweetest person holding our soc together, the one with the most amazing song choices AND dressing sense, and the very first person to get that first bite of cake (ikykyk)
So so so glad I got to meet and know you, really makes college seems worth it in the end. Future Mannat- Hope you’re even half as cool as the one right now :)
Absolutely ALL my love, Deepita

letters.author: Aryahi di
letters.content:
I first met Mannat through qrious, she was up editing the quiz ppt in the GCR. She struck me as the most innocent and adorable human. Like someone you wanna hug so tight and someone you’d fight for, because you just know by looking at her that she has the purest intentions 
Fav memory with Mannat was at Medicos with aparajita when we gossiped for so many hours it never ended. I remember her cascade of friend groups and her amazing speculations about a PG. It was an evening which never wanted to come to an end. She’s so so so so cuteeeeeeee
She and her beautiful smile just have a way of brightening up my day. I could be post night, half-dead, or incredibly annoyed at a PG but the moment you look at her it’s all rainbows. Everything just comes into focus on experiencing that happiness and you momentarily forget all your worries
Dear Mannat,
Keep smiling. Keep shining. 
You’re gonna be an amazing doctor. Be confident, and know that all will work out for the best❤️

letters.author: Manya Garg
letters.content: Happy Birthday, Mannat! 🩷 You're literally the sweetest person ever, and I'm so glad we got to know each other. Winning that competition together is still one of my favourite memories. I hope this year brings you lots of happiness, laughter, and everything you've been wishing for. Have the best birthday! 💗🎂

letters.author: Manasvi Singh
letters.content:
Dearest Mannat,
I don't remember when we first met. Maybe it was during attendance, maybe it was during dissection hall, because you were the adjacent roll number. To say that you're still just an adjacent roll number, that would be a grave understatement. 
We've been through tough vivas, seminar presentations, confusing endposts... we even waited together outside Kanika mam's office for an hour, and waited oh-so-long for medicine end-post. Picking one memory from these countless mundane yet lovely memories feels like picking one brush stroke from a beautiful painting; all of them blend into one beautiful bond. I cannot imagine this MBBS journey without you, without having you to rely on, without being there for you when you need me. 
In the future, whatever it brings — late-night internship surprises, scrambling to finish just one more topic before exams — I hope we'll still be side-by-side, still be besties, still be roll-number buddies. 
Happiest birthday cutie, and I hope you always keep smiling radiantly. 💙✨

letters.author: Lunshu
letters.content:
Happyyyyyyy birthdayyyy, Manni! 😋❤️

Be happy and blessed alwayyyysssssss! 💕

When I first saw you, I never really thought we’d have such a special place in each other’s lives. You were such a nice, well-behaved, sanskari baccha with that soft tone. 😭😭 I still remember when you said, “Hi, I’m Mannat.”
Your 19th birthday is still my favvvvv memory. 😭😭 We got ready in such a hurry, then went to the club, and I got drunk for the veryyyy first time. That’s when I realized you’re such a cool person. You were vibing like there was no tomorrow. 😭❤️ I absolutely loved that… and those random spankings ofccccccc. 😝😝
You’ve taught me how to balance everything, how to talk to people nicely (which I still don’t do, though 🤭), how to respect others, and how to be there for each other during tough times. 🥹🥹
Lastly, I just want us to stay like this forever or become even stronger. I hope you’re super successful, get your dream branch, and absolutely killlllllllll it in life! ❤️

Loads of love. 💕💕
Your Lunshu 😝

letters.author: Niharika
letters.content:
Hi C
So this C might sound like cutieee ....but its not .....sad right  ( tujhe toh pata h kya h)
Anyways  So u are finally turning 21....badi ho rahi h......................."umar se bas" ....so happy happy birthday to you 🎶 ....likhna toh bohot kuchh chaahti thi ...lekin paper h..and to be honest agar tere mere baare mein likhne jaungi toh novel ban jayegi ..hehe😅..so i ll stick to this 
Honestly I dont remember the first time humne kab baat ki thi yaa kaise dosti hui ....itna hi yaad h ki saali u were that arrogant studious woman for me...and I was that annoying tiffin stealer for you ....😁. But kisine sach hi kaha h dil ka raasta pait se hote hue jaata aur m tere tiffin ke chakkar mein tujhse impress hogyi 😌

letters.author: Shu
letters.content:
Hey Sweetest💖
I remember the day Chirag introduced us on the first day of Target, and since then you became a part of my life😘
I am soo proud of all your achievements, and also miss you soooooo muchhh!!
(And your lunchbox as well😭)
Wish to go back and eat chilli potatoes at target ka canteen once now...
Love you lotsss💞
I wish you all the success and happiness in life
I know this baby would be a Great Doctor soon!!
Jaldii milengeeeee.....

Have a crazzyyy 21!!💗

letters.author: Ishan Jijaji
letters.content:
Dearest Mannat,

Happy birthday! 🎂✨

I wanted to jump the gun by a couple of days to make sure you get this before the absolute chaos of July kicks in. Twenty one looks incredibly good on you, but honestly, you’ve got bigger fish to fry this month.
Third-year MBBS professional exams are breathing down your neck right now. If anyone can completely smash these papers, though, it’s you. You’ve worked incredibly hard to get here, and I have zero doubt that you are going to sail through them with flying colors. Consider this your official reminder that you are incredibly smart, capable, and so close to adding that "Dr." prefix to your name!
Beyond all the academic stuff, I just wanted to take a moment to tell you how incredibly grateful we are to have you in our lives. Your caring nature is honestly unmatched. You have this beautiful way of looking out for everyone around you, and it doesn't go unnoticed. The bond you share with your sister is truly special—you are such an amazingly supportive, loving, and lovely sister to my wife, and seeing you two together is always wonderful.
We are sending you the absolute biggest wishes for success, happiness, and peace of mind today and for the entire year ahead. Eat some good food, take a deep breath, and remember to celebrate yourself amidst all the studying.
We are rooting for you big time this month! Go ace those exams, and we will properly celebrate your birthday and your upcoming victory once the stress is behind you.
Lots of love and best wishes

letters.author: Papa
letters.content:
On this special day, I want you to know how deeply loved you are.
As you celebrate another year, I hope you always believe in yourself and never stop chasing your dreams. Life will bring both happiness and challenges, but remember that every experience helps you grow into the amazing person you are meant to be.
Never forget that you are capable of achieving great things. Be kind to others, stay true to your values, and always keep your smile alive. No matter how old you become or where life takes you, you will always be my little girl, and I will always be here for you.
May this birthday bring you endless happiness, good health, success, and countless beautiful memories. I pray that every wish you make today comes true.
Happy Birthday, my darling. 
With all my love,
Papa ❤️

letters.author: Mamma
letters.content: data:image/jpeg;base64,

letters.author: Didi
letters.content:
Dear Mannat, 
I think we named you right, “Mannat”, a wish- God gave you to us at the right moment- just when our family needed you the most. You completed a broken family, you gave mom and dad the space and love that I couldn’t give, ever. 
I can’t begin to tell you what a huge part you continue to play in my life. You are my therapist, my protecter, my well-wisher, my best friend, my shadow, my biggest cheerleader, and my strongest support system. 
You never let me let down myself. No one, absolutely no one can do that Mannat. 
I still remember when we were kids, I used to show you off to my friends- flexing how cute my little sister is. You used to run behind me, follow me, look up to me. To be honest, that made me a much better human, I wanted to be the best for you.  
You are always so full of life, you are naturally so caring to everyone around you. You don’t break down like me, you lift, you build, you grow. 
I remember I cried for everything, I cried over relationship problems, over exams, over self-doubt- and you always had just the right answers for me- “Didi, be of yourself and love yourself”
Mannat, you are fearless, you are kind, you are down to earth even when you know so much. The day you got into LHMC, was the day my dream came true. It was better for me to see you there than it would have been to see myself there.
As you are entering the new chapter, as you are 20s are about to start, I want you to know that life will change. It changes in many ways. There will be hardships and difficulties. But as always, I will stand tall like a shield for you, won’t let anything happen to you, ever. (Not that you will need me lol. we both know its always the other the way around) 
Just a year or 2, and you will become a doctor. There is no one that I have met who’s more worthy of this title than you, Mannat. You will live up to your fullest potential, you have made me, mom and dad so proud, and your hard work and resilience will make you reach heights. 
During my marriage- it was no one, no one but you and only you. I wouldn’t have been able to get married if it was not for you. From beginning till end, you handled me with such poise and patience. You broke down, still you stood tall, just so that I don’t come across any chaos. You were the perfect wedding planner and bridesmaid, period! Only you could have been that. (PS- only because of you I have a few bridal shots lol) 
I have learnt from you in these past years- how to stand up for myself, how to protect my peace, how to be happy and satisfied- I learnt all that from you. 
We will take a lot of trips, make a lot of reels, and I will buy you anything you want- soon enough. I know we have been planning this since a long time - but the times comes when it comes. And this year it will. 
It’s also your final year of MBBS now, and you will shine like a star, you will be the cutest and smartest doctor there ever was, and there ever will be. 
I love you so much Mannat, I think more than I love Ishaan lol.
I cannot survive this world without you. 
I am lucky and blessed to have you as my little sister. (PS- I didn’t show it enough but watching Voicemails for Isabelle was super uneasy, I can’t go through anything like that)
Happy 21st dear! The world awaits to see you shine. 
(PS- USMLE dede pleaseeeee)
With loads of love, 
Didi
